command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute 
-- Verify the column definition
SHOW COLUMNS FROM ai_assessments LIKE 'fraud_risk_level';

-- Check for any rows with old enum values that would now be NULL
SELECT fraud_risk_level, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM ai_assessments 
GROUP BY fraud_risk_level;
